prompt: Refactor the helloworld sample using jq++. The sample is at samples/helloworld/. Place the refactored sources under samples/.refactored/helloworld/, shared base files under samples/.refactored/shared/, and create a generate.sh. Run generate.sh to produce samples/.generated/helloworld/, verify the output matches the original, and report metrics (lines and words before/after) plus any interesting findings.

assertions.name: semantic_equivalence
assertions.description: yq -o=json of original and generated helloworld.yaml produce identical JSON

assertions.name: uses_extends_or_local
assertions.description: At least one .yaml++ file uses $extends or $local

assertions.name: line_reduction
assertions.description: Total lines in .yaml++ sources <= total lines in original .yaml files

assertions.name: two_deployments_share_base
assertions.description: Both deployment .yaml++ files reference a common base via $extends
